assertions.assertion: Calls .AddSaml() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: Uses .AddSaml2p() instead of the correct .AddSaml() method name.

assertions.assertion: No separate NuGet package is added — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Incorrectly suggests adding a separate Duende.IdentityServer.Saml2p NuGet package.

assertions.assertion: A SamlServiceProvider is created with EntityId set to 'https://crm.contoso.com'
assertions.rationale: Uses 'ServiceProvider' class instead of 'SamlServiceProvider'. EntityId is set correctly but wrong type.

assertions.assertion: AssertionConsumerServiceUrls uses IndexedEndpoint with Location 'https://crm.contoso.com/saml/acs' and Binding = SamlBinding.HttpPost
assertions.rationale: Uses AssertionConsumerServices with AssertionConsumerService type instead of AssertionConsumerServiceUrls with IndexedEndpoint and SamlBinding.HttpPost.

assertions.assertion: AllowedScopes is configured on the SamlServiceProvider (not empty)
assertions.rationale: No AllowedScopes property is configured on the service provider.
